files.00_Overview.md: Add Learning Objectives section at the beginning. Merge redundant 'Three Locations' table with existing Type/Location table. Consolidate Quick Reference tables.
files.01_Introduction.md: MAJOR OVERHAUL NEEDED: This file is 80% redundant with 00_Overview.md. Either: (a) Delete this file and merge any unique content into 00_Overview, or (b) Completely refactor to focus ONLY on historical context/motivation (Why field types exist). Remove all duplicate tables and template structure explanations.
files.02_Volume_Fields.md: Add Learning Objectives. Add 'When to Use' section before code examples. Consolidate Quick Reference. Add performance considerations (internalField vs boundaryField access patterns).
files.03_Surface_Fields.md: Add Learning Objectives. Add physical interpretation section (why flux matters). Merge redundant 'Why Surface Fields?' and 'Common Uses' content. Add flux conservation explanation.
files.04_Dimensional_Checking.md: Add Learning Objectives. Merge duplicate dimension tables. Consolidate 'Common Dimension Sets' and 'Dimension Errors' sections. Add debugging workflow.
files.05_Point_Fields.md: Add Learning Objectives. Add mesh motion physics context. Merge 'When to Use' table with use cases. Consolidate interpolation examples.
files.06_Dimensioned_Fields.md: Add Learning Objectives. Add visual class hierarchy diagram. Merge duplicate table (Field vs DimensionedField vs GeometricField). Add use case decision tree.
files.07_Common_Pitfalls.md: This file is well-structured but needs consistency check. Ensure all pitfalls reference actual OpenFOAM source locations. Add quick-reference summary table at end. Validate all code snippets compile.
files.08_Summary_and_Exercises.md: OVERHAUL NEEDED: File is 50% redundant with 00_Overview.md. Keep ONLY: (a) new exercise problems not covered elsewhere, (b) capstone project integrating all topics. Remove all summary tables - those belong in 00_Overview. Add 'Learning Path' roadmap.

global_strategy:
CRITICAL REDUNDANCE ISSUE: This folder has excessive content duplication between files (especially 00_Overview ↔ 01_Introduction ↔ 08_Summary). Strategy:

1. DEFINITION PHASE (Files 00-01):
   - 00_Overview: Reference hub with ALL tables, diagrams, quick references
   - 01_Introduction: DELETE or repurpose as 'Motivation & History' (NO technical specs)

2. CORE CONTENT (Files 02-06):
   - Each file: Learning Objectives → Physical Meaning → API → Examples → Pitfalls
   - Cross-link instead of repeat (e.g., 'See 02_Volume_Fields.md:4.3 for interpolation methods')

3. INTEGRATION (Files 07-08):
   - 07_Pitfalls: Keep as-is (good structure)
   - 08_Summary: DELETE summary content, keep only NEW exercises + capstone project

4. 3W FRAMEWORK AUDIT:
   - Every file needs: 'What (definition)' → 'Why (physics/importance)' → 'How (code/API)'
   - Missing: Key Takeaways boxes, Prerequisites sections

5. MISSING ELEMENTS TO ADD:
   - Learning Objectives at top of EVERY file
   - Key Takeaways summary at bottom of EVERY file
   - Prerequisites knowledge check
   - Difficulty indicators (Beginner/Intermediate/Advanced)
   - Estimated reading time
